items.name_cn:
【Dynamic Change Chip Top Quality Original Batch】
💀Model M11946 Black💞 M12061 Brown M12061 Apricot M11946 Rose M40995 Double-sided Tote Bag. This legendary Neverfull Medium Bag always meets all your tote needs. Spacious yet not bulky, structured yet soft, suitable for home and travel. Tighten the side drawstrings to instantly transform into a stylish city bag. Loosen the drawstrings to become a chic and practical tote. The long leather handle is suitable for shoulder or arm carry. This model is made of damier azur canvas. Dimensions: 31x28x14cm

Top-grain Leather M45959 Small Dauphine Handbag M44580: Nicolas Ghesquière launched the new Mini Dauphine Handbag for Spring/Summer 2019. The mini design fuses Monogram and Monogram Reverse canvas with calfskin trim. The LV lock shines brightly, while the leather shoulder strap creates a modern look. Suitable for day and night wear. Dimensions: 20.0 x 15.0 x 9.0 cm (L x H x W)

Top-grain Leather M45958 Medium Dauphine Handbag M44391: A new addition to the Louis Vuitton classic Dauphine Handbag series from the 2019 Pre-Fall collection. An updated design by Women's Artistic Director Nicolas Ghesquière. Combines Monogram canvas with Monogram Reverse canvas, featuring a chain strap and magnetic closure, showcasing the brand's tradition with a modern style and full of Louis Vuitton fashion flair. Dimensions: 25.0 x 17.0 x 10.5 cm (L x H x W)

Small M12099 Black M12109 Grey M12099 Brown M12106 Rose
Neverfull Bandoulière Inside Out BB Handbag This season's interpretation of a classic double-sided version, featuring the iconic Monogram canvas and grained leather on the front and back. The detachable zip pouch can be used alone or hung externally. A detachable shoulder strap allows for crossbody wear, while eye-catching metal hardware adds refined details.
Small 14 x 9 x 24 cm (H x W x L)
